title: Lines Written Under The Picture Of The Celebrated Miss Burns.
content:
Cease, ye prudes, your envious railings,
            Lovely Burns has charms, confess:
        True it is, she had one failing,
            Had a woman ever less?
meaning:
"Lines Written Under The Picture Of The Celebrated Miss Burns." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
